title: Add studybuddy to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [studybuddy](https://studybuddy-deploy2026.streamlit.app/) to learn
- studybuddy is an AI-powered learner assistant that helps students study using their own notes.

Fixes #12227

gist.headline: Notes, meet study buddy
gist.blurb: A new StudyBuddy has moved into the learning garden. Feed it your notes and it helps turn the usual study pile into something you can actually work with.
gist.summary: Added StudyBuddy to the Learn directory, an AI-powered study assistant that helps students study from their own notes.
gist.impact: Learners can now discover StudyBuddy through pollinations.ai and use their personal notes as the basis for AI-assisted study sessions.
gist.visual_concept: Depict a cozy digital study nook where Polly helps a friendly student-focused StudyBuddy organize handwritten notes into sprouting code-plants and neat flashcards. Use books, note pages, a warm retro terminal, and small garden flowers to represent learning growing from a learner's own material.
gist.image_prompt: A cozy pixel art study nook where Polly, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blushes, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wears tiny round reading glasses while helping organize a student's handwritten notes into glowing flashcards and little code-plants; a friendly retro StudyBuddy terminal sits beside books and flowers. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender-to-warm-cream gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, pixel-font text: "STUDY BUDDY", nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
